texto: The columnist gives these words to the longings of an 11-year-old he meets with Tourette's syndrome: "Wisdom is encoded in our common language. We all have, to some extent, a complex, sometimes adversarial, relationship with our physical selves. And I more than most people know that it is correct to say,'I have a body.' There is my body, and then there is ME, trying to make it behave.
explicacao: Citação de George F. Will sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The columnist gives these words to the longings of an 11-year-old he meets with Tourette's syndro…” articula reflexao, disability, fallen-world em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como fallen-world e identity.
